nasb.text: So he took him into his house and gave the donkeys fodder, and they washed their feet and ate and drank.

esv.text: So he brought him into his house and gave the donkeys feed. And they washed their feet, and ate and drank.

cnv.text: 於是把他領到自己的家裡，用飼料餵了驢，他們洗了腳，就吃喝起來。

ccb.text: 于是，那老人带他们回家，喂他们的驴。他们洗完脚后，便一起吃喝。
